description_long: This object is a set of six kitchen knives, each with a distinct blade shape and size, arranged in a row. The blades range from a small paring knife to a large bread knife and a long carving knife, all featuring a sleek, modern design. The handles are ergonomically contoured, likely made of a durable synthetic material, and are fastened with visible rivets for added strength. The blades are metallic, with one featuring a serrated edge for bread slicing, while the others have straight, sharp edges for various cutting tasks. The overall appearance is utilitarian and professional, suitable for culinary use in kitchens or food preparation areas. The set is visually unified by the consistent black handle design and polished blade finish.
description: A set of six modern kitchen knives with black ergonomic handles and metallic blades, including both straight and serrated edges. The knives vary in size and are designed for different culinary tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six knives side by side, highlighting the varying blade shapes and sizes, as well as the black handles with rivets.
description_view_1: Edge-on view showing the thinness of the blades and the stacked alignment of the handles, with minimal detail visible except the blade profiles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the knives in reverse order, again emphasizing the blade shapes and handle contours from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, showing the thin blade profiles and the alignment of the handles, similar to view 1.
attribute_blade_type: straight and serrated, single-edged, pointed tips
attribute_handle_design: contoured black synthetic handles with visible rivets
